entry.title: Regular signet reorgs
entry.summary: The recent updates on the fork-observer instance have effectively reinstated the signet network, which is now accessible and can be viewed directly through the provided link: [fork.observer/?network=3](https://fork.observer/?network=3). This enhancement has led to the observation of a two-block reorganization at block height 307073. In this specific event, the system also successfully identified the coinbase tags associated with different miners. Notably, 'signet-3 (inquisition)' appears to be linked to your mining activities, whereas 'signet-1' is identified as belonging to someone named Kalle. These developments are crucial for tracking and analyzing the dynamics and contributions of various participants within the blockchain's network.
